skills.name: Guts
skills.description: Above a certain health threshold, you withstand an attack that would normally cart you (once only).

levels.description: Above a certain health threshold, you withstand an attack that would normally cart you (once only).

skills.name: Earplugs
skills.description: Grants protection from large monsters' roars.

levels.description: Slightly reduces the effects of weak monster roars.
Reduces the effects of weak monster roars.
Nullifies weak monster roars and reduces the effects of strong monster roars.
Nullifies weak and strong monster roars.

skills.name: Blast Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of blast buildup. (Elemental buildup has a maximum limit.)

skills.name: Guard
skills.description: Reduces knockbacks and stamina depletion when guarding.

levels.description: Very slightly decreases the impact of attacks.
Slightly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%.
Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%.
Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
Massively decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
Delays blastblight and reduces blast damage.
Greatly delays blastblight and greatly reduces blast damage.

skills.name: Critical Draw
skills.description: Increases affinity when performing draw attacks.
